mod_description: Make money sending your bot out as a street-walking whore, higher rated bots get better clients!

missions.title: Whore
missions.description: Send {mark}[bot]{/} out as a street walker to earn money doing what [bot.heshe] was made for.
missions.launch_text: You explain to {mark}[bot]{/} what you expect from her. You select a sexy outfit to accentuate her assets and send her out to make you some money.

results.result_text: {mark}[bot]{/} returned looking a little bedraggled but [bot.heshe] earned good money for a bot with [bot.hisher] sex skill, rating, components, and condition.
{mark}[bot]{/} returned beat up but with the money [bot.heshe] earned. Thugs tried to rob [bot.himher] on the way home but [bot.heshe] fended them off.
After working, {mark}[bot]{/} was beaten and robbed on the way home. I'm lucky she made it home although she needs repair!
